38181.title: Wonders of Greece
38181.description: Bettany Hughes explores Athens, the crowning landmark of ancient Greek civilisation and a symbol of intellect and democracy the world over. She travels to Olympia, well known as the birthplace of the Olympics, and she finds there is much more to reveal about the wonders of the original Olympic site.

44663.title: Wonders of Greece
44663.description: Bettany travels to Aigai in the heart of Northern Greece, a capitol of the ancient Kingdom of Macedon, which boasts the biggest palace of all classical antiquity and one of the most spectacular archaeological treasure troves ever discovered. Bettany then visits Nafplion, one of Greece's most romantic cities and its first official capitol city. She finds that it is a place that embodies the compelling, complicated history of Greece.
